channel.title: World News, Today World News, Latest International News, World Breaking News, Trending News of World - Times of India
channel.description: World News Today: Read the latest world news headlines, Current International breaking news world wide. In depth analysis and top news headlines world wide.
channel.copyright: Copyright:(C) Thu, 14 May 2026 10:28:50 IST Bennett Coleman & Co. Ltd, http://in.indiatimes.com/policyterms/1554651.cms

image.title: World News, Today World News, Latest International News, World Breaking News, Trending News of World - Times of India

item.title: After hantavirus, now norovirus? How a gut bug forced a France cruise ship into lockdown
item.description: French authorities have eased restrictions on the cruise ship Ambition after confirming a viral gastrointestinal outbreak, not hantavirus, sickened dozens. Around 80 passengers and crew experienced symptoms, with no severe cases reported. A passenger's death was attributed to a heart attack, unrelated to the illness. The ship, carrying over 1,700 people, was temporarily restricted as a precaution.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Hantavirus outbreak: Deadly Andes strain detected in cruise ship cases; 8 cases confirmed
item.description: A hantavirus outbreak linked to the cruise ship MV Hondius has seen eight passengers test positive for the Andes virus, a strain known to spread between humans. Three lives have been lost so far. While the risk to the general public is low, passengers and crew are under quarantine for 42 days as investigations continue.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 'US, China should be partners not rivals': Key takeaways from Trump and Xi's much-watched summit
item.description: US President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping met at the Great Hall of the People, striking a warm and optimistic tone. Both leaders emphasized cooperation over confrontation, despite existing tensions. Trump praised the reception and Xi's leadership, while Xi framed the meeting as a defining moment for global stability and called for partnership.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: US renews $100m Cuba aid offer; alleges Havana blocking ‘critical life-saving aid’
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 'Home Alone' at White House: Vance jokes as Trump visits China for key talks
item.description: Vice President J.D. Vance likened his solitary White House presence to Macaulay Culkin in "Home Alone" due to Secret Service rules preventing him from traveling with President Trump. Vance also cautioned that federal funding for state health insurance programs could be halted if they don't cooperate with the administration's fraud crackdown.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: "I don’t like it": Donald Trump slams NFL over streaming shift, warns league is 'killing the golden goose' with digital push
item.description: Donald Trump has criticized the NFL’s growing shift toward streaming platforms and fragmented broadcast rights, arguing that it risks limiting access for ordinary fans. In a recent Full Measure interview, he warned that rising costs and multiple subscriptions could alienate viewers and even harm the league’s long-term popularity. While the Department of Justice investigates the NFL’s media distribution practices, Trump stopped short of calling for intervention but expressed clear discomfort with the current direction.
item.dc:creator: Prantik Prabal Roy

item.title: What is Trisha Paytas and James Charles feud? YouTuber faces backlash after Spirit Airlines rant controversy
item.description: Trisha Paytas publicly criticized James Charles after his deleted TikTok rant about a former Spirit Airlines employee asking for GoFundMe help. Their latest clash has brought attention back to their years-long feud, including past accusations, online fights, and harsh public statements that once again sparked strong reactions across social media platforms.
item.dc:creator: Sehjal Gupta

item.title: Who is Aysia Collins? D4vd’s alleged girlfriend breaks silence Celeste Rivas theories intensify
item.description: Aysia Collins, a California-based influencer allegedly linked to D4vd, has become a major topic in online discussions surrounding the Celeste Rivas case. Viral screenshots, livestream clips, and fan theories pushed her name across social media platforms. Collins later addressed the rumours in a Reddit post, claiming she was “no longer friends with David” and wanted “justice for Celeste Rivas.” Despite growing speculation, there is currently no public evidence showing Collins has been charged or formally accused.
item.dc:creator: Barsha Dutta

item.title: ChudTheBuilder dragged into shocking Tennessee courthouse shooting as alleged racist altercation turns violent suddenly
item.description: Streamer Dalton Eatherly, known as ChudTheBuilder, was reportedly involved in a courthouse shooting in Clarksville, Tennessee. Social media claims an altercation led to an accidental gun discharge, but police have not confirmed the details yet. The incident happened just days after the streamer’s arrest at a Nashville restaurant over an unpaid bill dispute.
item.dc:creator: Sehjal Gupta

item.title: Why was Tyler Oliveira deported and banned from Israel? YouTuber’s airport ordeal sparks backlash and debate
item.description: YouTuber Tyler Oliveira was denied entry into Israel after landing in Tel Aviv on May 12, 2026. He claimed authorities deported him over alleged “anti-Semitic” content linked to his controversial documentary about Jewish communities in New Jersey. Videos from the airport showed Oliveira questioning whether he would clear security while critics confronted him publicly. Streamer Sneako later reacted online, comparing Oliveira’s situation to his own travel bans and controversies.
item.dc:creator: Barsha Dutta

item.title: By day a priest, by night a wrestler: Meet the Mexican hero who raised money for an orphanage by fighting in wrestling rings
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: ‘A platonic relationship’: Book claims French President Emmanuel Macron exchanged private messages with Iranian actress Golshifteh Farahani
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Did Emmanuel Macron get slapped? Book claims French prez called Iranian actress 'pretty'
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Harshkumar Patel seeks to quash conviction in case linked to Indian family’s freezing deaths
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Switzerland’s summer hack: People swim through a river to get home from work
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Johnny Somali appeal takes new turn after second petition filed against streamer
item.description: Johnny Somali faces escalating legal troubles in South Korea with a second victim petition demanding harsher punishment. Currently appealing a six-month labor sentence for deepfake charges, the streamer's situation is complicated by his lawyer reportedly withdrawing. Leaked letters from detention, where he claimed to be "having fun," have also drawn public scrutiny as his appeal proceeds.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: Indian man killed in rare bear attack in Canada; last fatal incident reported 6 years ago
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: NASA confirms School bus-sized asteroid 2026 JH2 to pass very close to Earth
item.dc:creator: TOI Science Desk

item.title: The ancient city of Troy was rebuilt over itself for more than 4,000 years
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: NASA used this town to train Moon astronauts: The German town built inside a meteor crater filled with diamonds
item.dc:creator: TOI Science Desk
